summary:
Recovery: Average

Reading: State
Average
Recovery 56 • Sleep 66 • Strain 62%

Read
Recovery is serviceable, not abundant, and the day has already taken a moderate bite from the tank. Movement is running lighter than usual, so the open workout window favors controlled resistance quality over extra output, with protein still the weak link for muscle protection.

Measured strength, not strain.

Performance: Measured strength, not strain.
